title: Flat vs Nested Skill Directories
brief: A split comparison infographic. Left panel labeled 'Flat Layout' shows a messy vertical list of long hyphenated directory names: research-arxiv, research-polymarket, thirdparty-supabase, erik-wechat-renderer, team-prod-deploy, looking like temporary name badges. Right panel labeled 'Nested Layout' shows a clean tree: skills/ with branches official/, 3rd/, project/, personal/, team/. A curved arrow shows structure information moving from filenames back to the filesystem hierarchy. Clean flat infographic, soft colors, plenty of whitespace, bilingual Chinese-English labels.
prompt:
Create a polished article illustration titled 'Flat vs Nested Skill Directories'. Diagram type: architecture diagram. Use a flat technical infographic illustration, clean grouped modules, clear arrows, soft professional palette, concise bilingual labels, document-friendly composition. Make it suitable for insertion into engineering notes or a design document. Prefer a clear information hierarchy with section titles, concise Chinese/English labels, short notes, arrows, grouped modules, and strong readability. Avoid dense paragraph blocks. Language mode: zh-en. Target aspect ratio preset: doc-hd. Mode: text-only. Content brief:
A split comparison infographic. Left panel labeled 'Flat Layout' shows a messy vertical list of long hyphenated directory names: research-arxiv, research-polymarket, thirdparty-supabase, erik-wechat-renderer, team-prod-deploy, looking like temporary name badges. Right panel labeled 'Nested Layout' shows a clean tree: skills/ with branches official/, 3rd/, project/, personal/, team/. A curved arrow shows structure information moving from filenames back to the filesystem hierarchy. Clean flat infographic, soft colors, plenty of whitespace, bilingual Chinese-English labels.
